headline: NXP’s New i.MX 93W Fuses Edge Compute and Secure Wireless Connectivity to Accelerate Physical AI
summary: First applications processor to combine an AI NPU with secure, tri-radio connectivity, replacing up to 60 discrete components with a single packageAccelerates coordinated AI agent deployment with integrated edge compute and secure connectivity, supported by NXP software and eIQ® AI enablementPre-certified designs simplify wireless certification, eliminating RF complexity and speeding time-to-market NUREMBERG, Germany, March 09, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- NXP Semiconductors N.V. (NASDAQ: NXPI) toda
